title: Feature change-request schema (pillar 1)
intent: Provide humans and remote agents a uniform, machine-validated format for proposing feature changes via MCP so the rule engine can validate uniqueness and conflicts, the LLM judge has a stable anchor for evaluation, and `ibuki check` has a target to compare code against.

in: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 definition for the proposal payload
Reference template that validates clean against the schema
CI: validate schema against meta-schema and template against schema

acceptance_criteria: The schema MUST validate as JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 and be hosted at a stable path within the repository.
WHEN a proposal is submitted via MCP THEN the rule engine MUST reject any payload that fails schema validation before the LLM judge is invoked.
The schema MUST include tenant, project, feature_id, title, intent, scope (in/out), acceptance_criteria, supersedes (optional), proposer, submitted_at, and state.
The schema MUST be versioned via schema_version and the version MUST be embedded in every payload.
The schema MUST be reviewable as a git artifact at schema/v0.1.0/proposal.schema.json.
